# Saúl de León Guerrero

> Personal portfolio of Saúl de León Guerrero, Front-End Software Engineer based in Asturias, Spain.

## About

Experienced Software Engineer skilled in translating code into polished and efficient digital solutions. Specializes in front-end development with a focus on React, Next.js, and TypeScript.

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.sawl.dev/en/): Introduction, skills, and summary
- [Experience](https://www.sawl.dev/en/experience): Full work history (2012–present)
- [Portfolio](https://www.sawl.dev/en/portfolio): CV and portfolio overview
- [Blog](https://www.sawl.dev/en/blog): Technical articles
